title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Casa Grande

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Casa Grande
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
